content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

April 14, 2006

Vicki E. Hartigan
McMurchie Law
PO Box 6780
Folsom, CA 95763

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our Files No. W-05-170

Dear Ms. Hartigan:

Pursuant to your letter of October 13, 2005, we have withdrawn your request for advice in the above referenced matter.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: William J. Lenkeit
Senior Commission Counsel
Legal Division
